strategy_reasoning: The updates focus on maintenance (health checks, stale app removal) and organization (docs, badges). Using the 'Garden' metaphor fits the Pollinations brand perfectly, allowing us to visualize technical cleanup as cozy gardening and organization.
visual_style: Cozy 8-bit pixel art with soft lighting, lime green (#ecf874) accents, and pastel gradients. Lo-fi Stardew Valley aesthetic.

images.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a digital greenhouse. The main character is a cute pixel art bee mascot with a yellow body and dark brown horizontal stripes, small black legs, two black antennae, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink rectangular blush marks on cheeks, a small happy smile, and small rounded light blue translucent wings. She is wearing a tiny gardener's hat, pruning a withered vine. Next to her, a cute chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head is sticking labels on healthy lime green (#ecf874) code-plants. Soft pastel mint and peach background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'GARDEN WORK'. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients.
images.description: Polly and Robot maintaining the app ecosystem (pruning stale apps, labeling platforms).

images.prompt: Chunky pixel art scene. The main character is a cute pixel art bee mascot with a yellow body and dark brown horizontal stripes, small black legs, two black antennae, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink rectangular blush marks on cheeks, a small happy smile, and small rounded light blue translucent wings. She is holding a clean, glowing manual. Beside her, the round tan Nomnom creature with dot eyes is happily eating a pile of messy, glitchy papers. Speech bubble: 'NOMNOM'. Background is a soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient. Warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like A Short Hike. Text in pixel font: 'FRESH DOCS'. Nostalgic and cute.
images.description: Nomnom eating the old messy docs/bugs while Polly shows off the new clean documentation.

images.prompt: Cozy pixel art close-up. The main character is a cute pixel art bee mascot with a yellow body and dark brown horizontal stripes, small black legs, two black antennae, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink rectangular blush marks on cheeks, a small happy smile, and small rounded light blue translucent wings. She is wearing big retro headphones, resting on a lime green (#ecf874) cushion. A retro monitor in the background shows a clean, healthy green signal line. Floating pixel music notes. Soft cream and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, cozy atmosphere. Text in pixel font: 'ALL SYSTEMS GO'. 8-bit aesthetic.
images.description: Polly relaxing with music, symbolizing the audio fixes and improved health monitoring (signal over noise).

caption:
Spring cleaning in the server rack. We pruned the stale apps (RIP), added platform badges to the showcase, and finally structured the API docs so they make sense to humans.

Oh, and the health checks actually check health now. Less noise, more signal.

Check the changelog on GitHub.

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #documentation #devlog
alt_text: Pixel art carousel: 1. A bee and robot gardening in a digital greenhouse. 2. A round creature eating messy papers while a bee holds a clean book. 3. A bee wearing headphones relaxing near a health monitor.
